problem.summary: Compare a direct global-memory tile transform against a shared-memory tiled path intended for global-to-LDS staging replacement on gfx90a+.
outputs: output contains a copied or lightly transformed row-major matrix
constraints: Actual global-to-LDS staging inline LLVM IR / AMD GCN ISA or libcudacxx path is TODO
Record sm target and fallback path
Do not claim async-copy benefit without profiler or timing evidence

verification.method: Compare copied output against input for all elements.

curation.notes: The optimized source is a safe shared-memory staging placeholder with TODO markers for global-to-LDS staging groups and waits.
